Now

A running log, not a résumé.

Updated as things happen rather than rewritten before interviews. Think of it as a commit history for a career.

Jun 20, 2026 · shipped

Rebuilt this site from a static deck into a real Next.js + MDX setup so it stops rotting between job searches.

May 10, 2026 · wrote

Published a piece on why traditional case-study portfolios undersell design leaders — see Writing.

Mar 1, 2026 · spoke

Gave an internal talk on rebuilding design critique without adding more meetings.

Jan 15, 2024 · joined

Joined Company Name as Head of Design, leading the core product design team.
